message:
feat: kernel re-exports, manifest type extensions, bootstrap fix, mesh test expansion

fcp-kernel/lib.rs: Additional type re-exports for the kernel API
surface.

fcp-manifest/lib.rs: Manifest type extensions for connector metadata
and validation.

fcp-bootstrap/hardware_token.rs: Minor fix.

fcp-mesh/tests: Expanded mesh integration and no-mock test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
